title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 96.210 - Bequests, donations — board to be special trustees
text:
96.210.  Bequests, donations — board to be special trustees. — Any person making bequests or donations to such facility shall have the right to vest the title to the real estate or personal property so bequeathed or donated in the board and to be held and controlled by the board, and to all such property the board shall be held to be special trustees.
(RSMo 1939 § 7042, A.L. 1969 p. 171) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 6896
